competition_seasons_date_range_check.name: competition_seasons_date_range_check
competition_seasons_date_range_check.value: "competition_seasons"."starts_on" is null or "competition_seasons"."ends_on" is null or "competition_seasons"."ends_on" >= "competition_seasons"."starts_on"

matchdays_name_check.name: matchdays_name_check
matchdays_name_check.value: "matchdays"."name" is null or length(btrim("matchdays"."name")) between 1 and 120

matches_result_check.name: matches_result_check
matches_result_check.value:
(
        "matches"."status" = 'finished'
        and "matches"."home_score" is not null
        and "matches"."away_score" is not null
        and "matches"."home_score" >= 0
        and "matches"."away_score" >= 0
      ) or (
        "matches"."status" <> 'finished'
        and "matches"."home_score" is null
        and "matches"."away_score" is null
      )

teams_short_name_check.name: teams_short_name_check
teams_short_name_check.value: "teams"."short_name" is null or length(btrim("teams"."short_name")) between 1 and 40

pool_financial_settings_fee_check.name: pool_financial_settings_fee_check
pool_financial_settings_fee_check.value:
(
        "pool_financial_settings"."has_participation_fee" = true
        and "pool_financial_settings"."participation_fee_minor" is not null
        and "pool_financial_settings"."participation_fee_minor" > 0
      ) or (
        "pool_financial_settings"."has_participation_fee" = false
        and "pool_financial_settings"."participation_fee_minor" is null
      )

pool_prediction_rules_variant_check.name: pool_prediction_rules_variant_check
pool_prediction_rules_variant_check.value:
(
        "pool_prediction_rules"."mode" = 'simple'
        and "pool_prediction_rules"."result_points" > 0
        and "pool_prediction_rules"."exact_score_points" is null
        and "pool_prediction_rules"."perfect_matchday_bonus_points" is null
      ) or (
        "pool_prediction_rules"."mode" = 'score'
        and "pool_prediction_rules"."result_points" is null
        and "pool_prediction_rules"."exact_score_points" > 0
        and "pool_prediction_rules"."perfect_matchday_bonus_points" is null
      ) or (
        "pool_prediction_rules"."mode" = 'mixed'
        and "pool_prediction_rules"."result_points" > 0
        and "pool_prediction_rules"."exact_score_points" > "pool_prediction_rules"."result_points"
        and "pool_prediction_rules"."perfect_matchday_bonus_points" > 0
      )

pool_prize_allocations_variant_check.name: pool_prize_allocations_variant_check
pool_prize_allocations_variant_check.value:
"pool_prize_allocations"."calculation_mode" in ('percentage', 'fixed') and (
        ("pool_prize_allocations"."prize_model" = 'first_place' and "pool_prize_allocations"."position" = 1)
        or ("pool_prize_allocations"."prize_model" = 'top_three' and "pool_prize_allocations"."position" between 1 and 3)
      )

pool_prize_configurations_variant_check.name: pool_prize_configurations_variant_check
